meaning: adj.北极的,北极区的n.北极,北极圈
examples: Have any fish been contaminated in the Arctic Ocean?
Whales are still being hunted and killed in the Arctic.
Polar bears live in the Arctic.
Trees and well-tended gardens belie the location, just 100km south of the Arctic Circle.
Yet there are fears that reckless exploitation of Greenland's minerals could endanger the pristine Arctic environment.
